title: フクキタル的厄除けキタル

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru and I are on our way back to
the academy after a day out, when...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Waaah!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ouch...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, I really ate the sidewalk ther—huh?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Gyahhhhhh! My shoelaces snapped!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That's practically the same as the straps on geta
sandals breaking! My unlucky streak is back to
wreak havoc!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Argh, what should I do?! I can't go back to my
dorm like this!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I have to do something to ward off this evil...
even if it takes every last drop of my power!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru begins invoking a number of
spells.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Okely dokely, hoppity-mag! Havoc, I cast ye out,
ya nag!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Fragalo! Fragalolo! Vile havoc, crawl back in your
hole!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sun is setting, and the smell of dinner lingers
around the area surrounding the dorm.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for the holdup! I just need to do one—make
that two—more spells and I'll be done!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's been like this for an hour now. If I leave her
to it, this might last well into the evening.
choice_data_list: I think you've already cast out all the bad luck.

It smells like you're having curry for dinner
tonight.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I have?! When?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Now that you mention it, I do feel like a
weight's been lifted from my shoulders!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Would you look at that over there! What an
amazing four-leaf clover!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This confirms that the stars are aligning in my
favor! I can head back to the dorm with nary a
worry!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Phew, I feel much better now. Praise be to the
powers that live among us!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing what's for dinner, she suddenly seems
quite satisfied with the effectiveness of her spells.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: What did you just say? Curry?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This piquant, aromatic scent... That's definitely
curry! There's no time to waste! I've got to go!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh! But I have to consider the battle with
impending doom... But, no... But, I must...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Nrghhh!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I've got it! The aroma of curry is sure to wilt the
grasping tentacles of bad luck! I've done it yet
again! Eureka!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: This calls for a lucky daaash!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, she tells me in detail how delicious
the curry was and promises to find some sturdier
shoelaces.
